description: The Mesh Gizmo component is used to set up and generate the visuals/behavior of mesh orbs which are physical item/references to mesh data.

fields._target: The static mesh that this is referencing and displaying.
fields._inspectorRoot: The inspector this component generated when it was made.

usage: Used in mesh orbs used with the Mesh Tool and with scene inspectors for allowing physical hold able access to meshes for use in static and skinned mesh renderers.
